actions.name: clone_property
actions.description: Clone an existing property into a new property with inventory and rate plans.

code.description: Property code shown in reports and table views.

companyName.description: Legal company name for the property.

commercialRegisterEntry.description: Commercial register entry shown on invoices.

taxId.description: Tax identification number shown on invoices.

paymentTerms.description: Localized payment terms used by the property.

defaultCheckInTime.description: Default check-in time in ISO 8601 time format.

defaultCheckOutTime.description: Default check-out time in ISO 8601 time format.

idempotencyKey.description: Optional idempotency key used to safely retry the request.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for cloning a property.

id.description: Identifier returned by the successful create request.

outputSchema.description: Identifier payload returned by a create request.

actions.name: count_properties
actions.description: Return the total number of properties accessible to the connected apaleo account.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input fields.

actions.name: count_unit_groups
actions.description: Return the total number of unit groups matching the provided filters.

propertyId.description: Return unit groups for the specified property ID.

unitGroupTypes.description: Filter results by one or more unit group types.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for counting unit groups.

actions.name: count_units
actions.description: Return the total number of units matching the provided filters.

propertyId.description: Return units for the specified property ID.

unitGroupId.description: Deprecated single unit group filter kept for compatibility.

unitGroupIds.description: Return units for the specified unit group IDs.

unitAttributeIds.description: Return units that have the specified unit attribute IDs.

isOccupied.description: Filter by occupied or vacant units.

condition.description: Current cleanliness state of the unit.

textSearch.description: Case-insensitive search term matched against the unit name.

status.description: Whether to return active units, archived units, or both.

inputSchema.description: Common filters accepted by unit list and count actions.

actions.name: create_multiple_units
actions.description: Create multiple units in a single bulk request.

propertyId.description: Property ID where the unit should be created.

unitGroupId.description: Unit group ID for the new unit.

condition.description: Current cleanliness state of the unit.

items.description: Unit attribute reference used during unit creation.

attributes.description: Unit attributes assigned to the unit.

unitId.description: ID of a unit used inside a combined unit.

items.description: Connected unit reference used during unit creation.

connectedUnits.description: Units used to compose this combined unit.

idempotencyKey.description: Optional idempotency key used to safely retry the request.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for creating multiple units.

ids.description: Identifiers returned by the bulk create request.
